name: Automated Approval Workflow
description: Set up an automated approval chain — for leave requests, expense claims, or document sign-off — that runs when someone submits a form or calls a URL.

steps.title: Workflow Details
steps.description: Give your approval workflow a name and choose where it will run.

fields.name: workflowName
fields.label: What should we call this workflow?
fields.helpText: Use a name that describes what this workflow approves, e.g. 'expense-claims' or 'document-review'.

steps.title: Approval Settings
steps.description: Configure how approvals are handled and how long to wait for a response.

fields.name: approvalSteps
fields.label: How many levels of approval are needed?
fields.helpText: For most use cases, 1 or 2 levels is sufficient. Add more levels for high-value or compliance-sensitive requests.

fields.name: timeoutDays
fields.label: How many days before an unanswered request is flagged?
fields.helpText: If an approver does not respond within this many days, the request will be marked as overdue. Recommended: 3 days.

name: Scheduled Task Runner
description: Run an automated task on a schedule — daily reports, weekly data syncs, or overnight batch jobs — without anyone needing to remember to do it.

steps.title: Task Details
steps.description: Give your scheduled task a name and choose where it will run.

fields.name: workflowName
fields.label: What should we call this scheduled task?
fields.helpText: Use a name that describes what this task does, e.g. 'monthly-member-report' or 'nightly-data-sync'.

steps.title: Schedule
steps.description: Set how often this task should run and at what time.

fields.name: frequency
fields.label: How often should this task run?
fields.helpText: Choose the interval that matches your business need.

name: Static Web App
description: Deploy a modern web app that serves static content directly from the cloud with automatic CI/CD and global CDN.

steps.title: Basic Details
steps.description: Give your static web app a name and choose where it will run.

fields.name: appName
fields.label: What should we call this application?
fields.helpText: This will be part of your application's web address.

steps.title: Performance
steps.description: Choose how powerful your application should be.

fields.name: sku
fields.label: Which plan do you need?
fields.helpText: Free is great for testing and personal projects. Standard adds custom domains and more bandwidth.

options.label: Free — For testing and personal projects
